title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A tragic story of wealth, love, and the American Dream set in the Roaring Twenties.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A powerful exploration of racial injustice and moral growth in the American South.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian novel depicting a totalitarian regime and extreme surveillance.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A fantasy adventure following Bilbo Baggins on a quest to reclaim a lost treasure.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his journey at Hogwarts.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship focusing on writing clean and maintainable code.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt and David Thomas
description: A guide to becoming a better programmer through practical advice and best practices.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: A comprehensive textbook covering a wide range of algorithms in depth.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible overview of cosmology, black holes, and the nature of the universe.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: An influential book on evolution focusing on genes as the unit of natural selection.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A sweeping narrative of human history from ancient times to the present.

title: The Origin of Species
author: Charles Darwin
description: A foundational work of evolutionary biology introducing natural selection.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical story about following your dreams and destiny.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: Explores the two systems of thought that drive human decision-making.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through small changes.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
description: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life by focusing on what matters.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Focuses on achieving high productivity through deep, distraction-free work.

title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
description: A methodology for developing businesses and products efficiently.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert Kiyosaki
description: Teaches financial literacy through contrasting two father figures.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
description: A memoir about growing up in isolation and pursuing education against all odds.
